Workspaces

Each company gets its own private hub.

A workspace is the company, client or team container. It owns projects, people, assets, knowledge, privacy and showcase settings.

Create workspaceOpen Project Hub
Private

CSorro Ltd

OS development, website, product roadmap, network and launch planning.

3 projects · 4 people · showcase offPrivate

RyanNotBrian

Recordings, series planning, thumbnails, assets, server prep and approvals.

5 projects · 8 people · showcase offPrivate

Hull Podcast

Episode planning, branding, clips, artwork, guest notes and social posts.

2 projects · 3 people · portfolio allowed

Workspace logic

CEO example: if you run 4 companies, each company is a workspace. Inside each workspace are separate projects. You can invite someone to the whole workspace or only to one project.
